boilerplate_cleanup_rules: Remove navigation, cookie, subscription, share, and newsletter boilerplate.
Remove repeated source labels and duplicated article headers.
Remove warning markers such as Fetch failed, Paywall, and warning symbols from model-facing text.
Remove source/provenance prefixes from model-facing text while preserving provenance in selection_notes.json.
Keep article-body evidence, dates, company names, product mechanics, quoted claims, and risk/caveat language.

quality_rules.analogue: Allowed only for nuance or distractor roles unless expert review explicitly approves otherwise.
quality_rules.core: Core evidence articles must use exact or near_exact full text.
quality_rules.local_summary: Allowed only for nuance or distractor roles unless expert review explicitly approves otherwise.
quality_rules.unusable: Article must be replaced before model-facing inputs are built.

full_text_inputs.short_source_exception_policy: If the local source artifact is shorter than 1,500 characters, the exception must be documented in selection_notes.json with full_text_quality_notes.
full_text_inputs.soft_cap_exception_policy: Text longer than the soft cap can be retained only with cleaning notes explaining why truncation would remove important evidence.

pilot_scope: ND-only pilot based on reqret-001; other cases deferred until ND freeze.

scoring_dimensions.avito_usefulness: Synthesis connects evidence back to Avito New Developments investment implications.
scoring_dimensions.evidence_grounding: Major theses, risks, and implications include supporting article IDs from the supplied input set.
scoring_dimensions.forbidden_claims: Unsupported or over-stated claims are penalized even when directionally plausible.
scoring_dimensions.risk_coverage: Relevant risks, limits, or counter-signals are represented without overwhelming the answer.
scoring_dimensions.thesis_recall: Expected must-cover theses are present in the model output.
